_culturalNote: This theme is created with deep respect for the Aboriginal and Torres Strait Islander peoples of Australia. The Dreaming (Tjukurpa, Jukurrpa, Altjira and many other names across nations) is sacred living lore, not fiction. Names used here are publicly documented ancestral beings drawn from many distinct First Nations across the continent. We acknowledge the Traditional Custodians of all lands, waters and skies, and pay respect to Elders past, present and emerging.

roles.name: Songline Keeper
roles.description: Holder of the great songlines — designs the over-arching solution by tracing how every piece sings together across Country.

roles.name: Camp Boss
roles.description: Organises the camp, the journey and the seasonal moves — keeps the mob on track from kickoff to handover.

roles.name: Lawkeeper of the Records
roles.description: Steward of customary records, layouts and permissions — keeps the lore tidy and the right people seeing the right things.

roles.name: Toolmaker of Stone and Sky
roles.description: Knaps the sharp Apex blades, weaves LWC dilly-bags and shapes platform tools fit for purpose.

roles.name: Elder of the Western Camps
roles.description: Senior Elder for Salesforce craft across the Western camps — sets standards and mentors the senior toolmakers.

roles.name: Senior Tracker of the Inland Paths
roles.description: Reads the country and the requirements with practiced eye — leads discovery and delivery on the inland routes.

roles.name: Apprentice Tracker
roles.description: Carries the dilly-bag of configuration and discovery under the senior tracker's eye.

roles.name: Bridge-builder of the River-Crossings
roles.description: Designs the great crossings between Salesforce and the realms beyond — APIs, events and middleware.

roles.name: Senior Bark-Canoe Maker
roles.description: Lashes the integration canoes that ferry data between systems — middleware, batch and callouts.

roles.name: Apprentice Canoe Maker
roles.description: Learns the craft of integration — webhooks, retries and the patterns of error handling.

roles.name: Healer of the Bora Ground
roles.description: Tends the build before it meets the mob — finds the cracks and the spear-points before go-live.

roles.name: Voice of the Corroboree
roles.description: Calls the mob to gathering — leads all marketing craft, the painted message and the smoke-signal.

roles.name: Senior Storypainter
roles.description: Strategist of campaigns — paints the stories on bark and stone that gather the people.

roles.name: Storypainter
roles.description: Carries the campaign across the country — content, dot-paintings and the daily walk.

roles.name: Listener at the Coolamon
roles.description: Sits at the coolamon and listens — translates between the customer's need and the toolmaker's craft.

roles.name: Senior Toolmaker of the Eastern Camps
roles.description: Master craftsman of the Eastern camps — shapes the most senior platform builds and mentors the apprentices.

roles.name: Junior Tracker
roles.description: Fresh to the songline — learning to read the country, the data and the customer.

_realmNotes: The four realms here are not real Aboriginal nations — they are thematic groupings of publicly documented ancestral beings, organised by the role each plays in the Dreaming. They are presented with respect. Window offsets are negative so most of each project sits in the past for time-entry seeding.

realms.projectName: Sky Country — Creator Beings CRM Rollout
realms.subAccountName: Sky Country Council of Creator Beings

rainbow-serpent-cycle.themedRole: Senior Tracker of the Inland Paths

mortal-heroes-tricksters.themedRole: Senior Tracker of the Inland Paths

totemic-and-place-spirits.themedRole: Senior Toolmaker of the Eastern Camps

creator-ancestral-beings.name: First Fire Lit
creator-ancestral-beings.description: Discovery sign-off — the first fire is lit and the council convened.

creator-ancestral-beings.name: Mountains Raised
creator-ancestral-beings.description: Build kickoff: the great ranges are pushed up from the flat earth.

creator-ancestral-beings.name: Council of the Sky Elders
creator-ancestral-beings.description: Mid-project gate: review with Baiame and the sky elders.

creator-ancestral-beings.name: First Rains Invoice
creator-ancestral-beings.description: Phase invoice: the rains arrive, the first season closes.

creator-ancestral-beings.name: First People Walk the Land
creator-ancestral-beings.description: Go-Live: the first people walk the new country.

creator-ancestral-beings.name: Lore Handed Down
creator-ancestral-beings.description: Hyper-care close: the lore is passed to the next generation.

rainbow-serpent-cycle.name: Serpent Wakes from the Waterhole
rainbow-serpent-cycle.description: Project kickoff: the Rainbow Serpent stirs and the journey begins.

rainbow-serpent-cycle.name: Riverbeds Carved
rainbow-serpent-cycle.description: Build phase: the great river channels are carved across country.

rainbow-serpent-cycle.name: Wet Season UAT
rainbow-serpent-cycle.description: UAT gate: the floods arrive and the channels hold.

rainbow-serpent-cycle.name: Billabongs Filled
rainbow-serpent-cycle.description: Go-Live: every billabong sings with water and life.

rainbow-serpent-cycle.name: Serpent Returns to Rest
rainbow-serpent-cycle.description: Hyper-care close: the Rainbow Serpent coils back into the deep waterhole.

rainbow-serpent-cycle.name: Custodians Paid
rainbow-serpent-cycle.description: Final invoice: the water-keepers are honoured for the cycle's work.

mortal-heroes-tricksters.name: Walkabout Begins
mortal-heroes-tricksters.description: Discovery: the heroes set out on walkabout to read the country.

mortal-heroes-tricksters.name: Spears and Boomerangs Forged
mortal-heroes-tricksters.description: Build: the bush tools are made ready for the trials ahead.

mortal-heroes-tricksters.name: Trickster's Audit
mortal-heroes-tricksters.description: Solution review: the trickster tests every claim with sharp questions.

mortal-heroes-tricksters.name: Hero's Return
mortal-heroes-tricksters.description: Go-Live: the heroes return triumphant with the lore intact.

mortal-heroes-tricksters.name: Camp Stories Told
mortal-heroes-tricksters.description: Project close: the deeds are told around the fire and committed to memory.

mortal-heroes-tricksters.name: Hunters Paid in Kind
mortal-heroes-tricksters.description: Final invoice from the bush camp.

totemic-and-place-spirits.name: Custodians' Council
totemic-and-place-spirits.description: Kickoff council with the place-spirits and totem ancestors.

totemic-and-place-spirits.name: Star Charts Drawn
totemic-and-place-spirits.description: Discovery: the seasonal sky-charts are drawn from the night patterns.

totemic-and-place-spirits.name: Totems Recorded on Bark
totemic-and-place-spirits.description: Build: the totem registry is painted onto bark and stone.

totemic-and-place-spirits.name: Sacred Sites Acceptance
totemic-and-place-spirits.description: UAT acceptance: each sacred site is walked and signed off by its custodian.

totemic-and-place-spirits.name: Country Sings Again
totemic-and-place-spirits.description: Go-Live + handoff: the country and its totems are alive in the system.

totemic-and-place-spirits.name: Final Tribute
totemic-and-place-spirits.description: Final invoice: tribute paid to the custodians and place-spirits.

Baiame.notes: Retreat to the sky country — annual ascension.

Yhi.notes: Solstice rest — sun pauses at the horizon.

Bunjil.notes: Eaglehawk's high circling — surveying the land from above.

Wagyl.notes: Returning to the Swan River source.

Yurlungur.notes: Coiled rest beneath the Arnhem Land waterhole.

Wonambi.notes: Slow shedding of the great skin — biennial.

Tiddalik.notes: Drinking all the water — recovery afterwards.

Ngurunderi.notes: Hunting the great Murray cod down the river.

Mimi.notes: Hiding in the rock crevices — windy day.

Bunyip.notes: Lurking deeper in the swamp — quarterly seclusion.

Tjilbruke.notes: Walking the freshwater springs of the Adelaide coast.

Bahloo.notes: New moon dark — Bahloo hides his face.

Wuriupranili.notes: Sunset ceremony — torch dipped below the horizon.

Kangaroo Ancestor.notes: Mob gathering at the totem ground.
